metadata.description: Full Hugging Face Skills manifest for hf skills, MCP, and discovery. Client plugin marketplaces use curated manifests.

plugins.name: hf-cli
plugins.description: Hugging Face Hub CLI (`hf`) for downloading, uploading, and managing models, datasets, spaces, buckets, repos, papers, jobs, and more on the Hugging Face Hub.

plugins.name: hf-cloud-aws-context-discovery
plugins.description: Discover the user''s local AWS context (active profile, region, account ID, caller identity) at the start of any AWS task.

plugins.name: hf-cloud-python-env-setup
plugins.description: Set up an isolated Python environment for SageMaker / AWS work, with the right Python version and current boto3.

plugins.name: hf-cloud-sagemaker-deployment-planner
plugins.description: Plan and coordinate the deployment of a model to Amazon SageMaker AI.

plugins.name: hf-cloud-sagemaker-iam-preflight
plugins.description: Ensure a usable SageMaker execution role exists before deploying or training.

plugins.name: hf-cloud-sagemaker-production-defaults
plugins.description: Create a SageMaker endpoint (real-time or async) with autoscaling, CloudWatch alarms, and tagging enabled by default.

plugins.name: hf-cloud-serving-image-selection
plugins.description: Pick the right serving container for a SageMaker model deployment and find its current image URI.

plugins.name: hf-mem
plugins.description: Hugging Face CLI to estimate the required memory to load Safetensors or GGUF model weights for inference from the Hugging Face Hub

plugins.name: huggingface-best
plugins.description: Use when the user asks about finding the best, top, or recommended model for a task, wants to know what AI model to use, or wants to compare models by benchmark scores.

plugins.name: huggingface-community-evals
plugins.description: Run evaluations for Hugging Face Hub models using inspect-ai and lighteval on local hardware.

plugins.name: huggingface-datasets
plugins.description: Use this skill for Hugging Face Dataset Viewer API workflows that fetch subset/split metadata, paginate rows, search text, apply filters, download parquet URLs, and read size or statistics.

plugins.name: huggingface-gradio
plugins.description: Build Gradio web UIs and demos in Python.

plugins.name: huggingface-llm-trainer
plugins.description: Train or fine-tune language and vision models using TRL (Transformer Reinforcement Learning) or Unsloth with Hugging Face Jobs infrastructure.

plugins.name: huggingface-local-models
plugins.description: Use to select models to run locally with llama.cpp and GGUF on CPU, Mac Metal, CUDA, or ROCm.

plugins.name: huggingface-lora-space-builder
plugins.description: Build and publish a Gradio demo on Hugging Face Spaces for a user-provided LoRA.

plugins.name: huggingface-paper-publisher
plugins.description: Publish and manage research papers on Hugging Face Hub.

plugins.name: huggingface-papers
plugins.description: Look up and read Hugging Face paper pages in markdown, and use the papers API for structured metadata such as authors, linked models/datasets/spaces, Github repo and project page.

plugins.name: huggingface-spaces
plugins.description: Build, deploy, and maintain applications on Hugging Face Spaces — Gradio / Docker / Static SDKs, ZeroGPU and dedicated hardware, model loading, debugging, buckets, inference providers, community grants.

plugins.name: huggingface-tool-builder
plugins.description: Use this skill when the user wants to build tool/scripts or achieve a task where using data from the Hugging Face API would help.

plugins.name: huggingface-trackio
plugins.description: Track and visualize ML training experiments with Trackio.

plugins.name: huggingface-vision-trainer
plugins.description: Trains and fine-tunes vision models for object detection (D-FINE, RT-DETR v2, DETR, YOLOS), image classification (timm models — MobileNetV3, MobileViT, ResNet, ViT/DINOv3 — plus any Transformers classifier), and SAM/SAM2 segmentation using Hugging Face Transformers on Hugging Face Jobs cloud GPUs.

plugins.name: huggingface-zerogpu
plugins.description: AI demos and GPU compute with Gradio Spaces and Hugging Face Spaces ZeroGPU.

plugins.name: train-sentence-transformers
plugins.description: Train or fine-tune sentence-transformers models across `SentenceTransformer` (bi-encoder; dense or static embedding model; for retrieval, similarity, clustering, classification, paraphrase mining, dedup, multimodal), `CrossEncoder` (reranker; pair scoring for two-stage retrieval / pair classification), and `SparseEncoder` (SPLADE, sparse embedding model; for learned-sparse retrieval).

plugins.name: transformers-js
plugins.description: Use Transformers.js to run state-of-the-art machine learning models directly in JavaScript/TypeScript.

plugins.name: trl-training
plugins.description: Train and fine-tune transformer language models using TRL (Transformers Reinforcement Learning).
